meaning: adj.小的,不重要的,小规模的,小型的,细微的,小器的,卑鄙的
examples: How could you be so petty?
She felt boxed in by all their petty rules.
She felt hemmed in by all their petty rules and regulations.
This petty infirmity and its accompanying mood swings got me mulling over ex-Hewlett-Packard chairman Patricia Dunn.
Ms Rimington's is a catalogue of slights, frustrations and petty humiliations at the hands of men.
